songs.title: Outbound
feed: “Outbound” by After reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Outbound” by After reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 38 spots to #1.
“Outbound” by After climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 38 spots to #1.
“Outbound” by After is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 765% to 640 points.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 48 sales units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 87 streams units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 19 airplay units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 564,872 total units.
